summary: Taiki Maeda has flipped bullish in his most recent video, declaring 'The Bottom Is In' and predicting Bitcoin will move to higher prices.
narrative: After months of profiting from bearish ETH shorts, Maeda's latest analysis suggests the market is bottoming, citing STRC as a potential marginal buying force to propel BTC upward. He challenges standard four-year cycle theories with a new framework for identifying bottoms, marking a distinct shift away from his previous 'capital preservation' stance.

tweets.text: 🎬 Closed my ETH Short. What’s Next for Crypto?
🎬 Why I’m Short $1.5M of ETH (It’s So Over)
